summary: Iteration 164 — Golden Seed SDK + EchoCommandBar testing complete. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features verified (EchoCommandBar, Golden Seed Admin, Echo Activity tape). Regression routes working (/pastry, /beo, /eng-ops/stratus).
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/seed/pillars → 200, returns 7 pillars (brain, spine, sidebar, stripe-standalone, auth, observability, cognition) ✓
GET /api/seed/manifest → 200, returns 6 templates + manifest ✓
GET /api/seed/spawns without X-Admin-Token → 401 ✓
GET /api/seed/spawns with X-Admin-Token → 200 ✓
POST /api/seed/spawn with admin token → creates spawn record, returns spawn_id + download_url ✓
GET /api/seed/download/{spawn_id} → streams .tar.gz tarball with SPAWN.json at archive root ✓
Main app at / loads without regression ✓
Echo command launcher present (data-testid='echo-cmd-launcher') with text 'ECHO ⌘K' ✓
Old EchoAiLauncher orb (data-testid='echo-ai-orb-fab') NOT mounted (correctly removed) ✓
Echo Activity tape toggle visible (data-testid='echo-tape-toggle') with text 'ECHO ACTIVITY' (renamed from 'ECHO TAPE') ✓
Ctrl+K opens command palette (data-testid='echo-cmd-palette') ✓
Command input (data-testid='echo-cmd-input') present and functional ✓
Typing 'golden' filters to 'Spawn a Custom OS (Golden Seed)' suggestion ✓
Echo event tape drawer opens on toggle click (data-testid='echo-event-tape') ✓
/seed/admin renders GoldenSeedAdmin panel (data-testid='golden-seed-admin') ✓
Golden Seed Admin shows 7 pillars grid, spawn form, template chips, download buttons ✓
Regression: /pastry loads with pastry-hero-title ✓
Regression: /pastry/admin shows 'Admin token required' message ✓
Regression: /beo loads with beo-landing ✓
Regression: /beo/admin shows 'Loading...' (expected - requires admin token prompt) ✓
Regression: /eng-ops/stratus loads with SLA escalation chain ✓
Regression: /api/pastry/admin/subscribers → 401 without token, 200 with token ✓
seed_data_creation: Created test spawn 'TEST_Iter164_Platform' in golden_seed_spawns collection during pytest
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter164 delivered: (1) Golden Seed SDK backend routes at /api/seed/* — pillars (7), manifest (6 templates), spawns (admin-gated), spawn creation, tarball download with SPAWN.json. (2) EchoCommandBar replaces old EchoAiLauncher orb — Ctrl+K opens command palette, 'Echo Activity' tape toggle on right edge, suggestions include 'Spawn Custom OS (Golden Seed)'. (3) /seed/admin route renders GoldenSeedAdmin panel with pillars grid, spawn form, template chips. (4) Old orb (EchoAiLauncher) no longer mounted in DesktopShell. All regression routes (/pastry, /beo, /eng-ops) working.
